targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time, count() AS value
FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
PREWHERE swarmId = '${swarm}' AND $__timeFilter(eventTime)
WHERE ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), if(businessCodeKey = '', 'n/a', businessCodeKey)))

SELECT now() AS time, avg(processorSuccess) * 100 AS value
FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
PREWHERE swarmId = '${swarm}' AND $__timeFilter(eventTime)
WHERE ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), if(businessCodeKey = '', 'n/a', businessCodeKey)))

SELECT now() AS time, avg(businessSuccess) * 100 AS value
FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
PREWHERE swarmId = '${swarm}' AND $__timeFilter(eventTime)
WHERE ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), if(businessCodeKey = '', 'n/a', businessCodeKey)))

SELECT now() AS time, quantileTDigest(0.95)(processorDurationMs) AS value
FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
PREWHERE swarmId = '${swarm}' AND $__timeFilter(eventTime)
WHERE ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), if(businessCodeKey = '', 'n/a', businessCodeKey)))

panels.description: Long-range transaction volume for the selected swarm.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(eventTime, toIntervalSecond(greatest($__interval_s, 3600))) AS time,
  'transactions' AS series,
  count() AS txns
FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
PREWHERE swarmId = '${swarm}' AND $__timeFilter(eventTime)
WHERE ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), if(businessCodeKey = '', 'n/a', businessCodeKey)))
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Hourly transaction volume

panels.description: One-scan p50/p95/p99 RTT trend for the selected swarm.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, series, value_ms
FROM (
  SELECT
    time,
    concat('p', label) AS series,
    value_ms
  FROM (
    SELECT
      toStartOfInterval(eventTime, toIntervalSecond(greatest($__interval_s, 3600))) AS time,
      quantilesTDigest(0.50, 0.95, 0.99)(processorDurationMs) AS qs
    FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
PREWHERE swarmId = '${swarm}' AND $__timeFilter(eventTime)
WHERE ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), if(businessCodeKey = '', 'n/a', businessCodeKey)))
    GROUP BY time
  )
  ARRAY JOIN ['50', '95', '99'] AS label, [qs[1], qs[2], qs[3]] AS value_ms
)
ORDER BY time, series

panels.title: RTT percentiles

panels.description: Processor and business success trends with low series cardinality.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time, series, pct
FROM (
  SELECT
    time,
    series,
    pct
  FROM (
    SELECT
      toStartOfInterval(eventTime, toIntervalSecond(greatest($__interval_s, 3600))) AS time,
      avg(processorSuccess) * 100 AS processor_success,
      avg(businessSuccess) * 100 AS business_success
    FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
PREWHERE swarmId = '${swarm}' AND $__timeFilter(eventTime)
WHERE ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), if(businessCodeKey = '', 'n/a', businessCodeKey)))
    GROUP BY time
  )
  ARRAY JOIN ['processor', 'business'] AS series, [processor_success, business_success] AS pct
)
ORDER BY time, series

panels.title: Success rates

panels.description: Processor status class volume over time.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(eventTime, toIntervalSecond(greatest($__interval_s, 3600))) AS time,
  processorStatusClass AS series,
  count() AS txns
FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
PREWHERE swarmId = '${swarm}' AND $__timeFilter(eventTime)
WHERE ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), if(businessCodeKey = '', 'n/a', businessCodeKey)))
GROUP BY time, processorStatusClass
ORDER BY time, series

panels.title: Processor status classes

panels.description: Limited drill-down table for the selected swarm.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  if(callIdKey = '', 'unknown', callIdKey) AS callId,
  if(businessCodeKey = '', 'n/a', businessCodeKey) AS businessCode,
  count() AS txns,
  round(avg(processorDurationMs), 1) AS avg_rtt_ms,
  round(quantileTDigest(0.95)(processorDurationMs), 1) AS p95_rtt_ms,
  round(quantileTDigest(0.99)(processorDurationMs), 1) AS p99_rtt_ms,
  max(processorDurationMs) AS max_rtt_ms,
  round(avg(processorSuccess) * 100, 2) AS processor_success_pct,
  round(avg(businessSuccess) * 100, 2) AS business_success_pct
FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
PREWHERE swarmId = '${swarm}' AND $__timeFilter(eventTime)
WHERE ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), if(businessCodeKey = '', 'n/a', businessCodeKey)))
GROUP BY callId, businessCode
ORDER BY txns DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Top call/business groups by volume

panels.description: Quality-focused drill-down table for the selected swarm.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  if(callIdKey = '', 'unknown', callIdKey) AS callId,
  if(businessCodeKey = '', 'n/a', businessCodeKey) AS businessCode,
  count() AS txns,
  round((1 - avg(businessSuccess)) * 100, 2) AS business_fail_pct,
  round((1 - avg(processorSuccess)) * 100, 2) AS processor_fail_pct,
  round(quantileTDigest(0.95)(processorDurationMs), 1) AS p95_rtt_ms,
  max(processorDurationMs) AS max_rtt_ms
FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
PREWHERE swarmId = '${swarm}' AND $__timeFilter(eventTime)
WHERE ('${callId:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${callId:csv}'), callIdKey))
  AND ('${businessCode:csv}' IN ('$__all', '.*') OR has(splitByChar(',', '${businessCode:csv}'), if(businessCodeKey = '', 'n/a', businessCodeKey)))
GROUP BY callId, businessCode
HAVING txns >= 20
ORDER BY business_fail_pct DESC, processor_fail_pct DESC, p95_rtt_ms DESC
LIMIT 50

panels.title: Worst call/business groups by quality

list.definition:
SELECT swarmId
FROM (
  SELECT swarmId, max(eventTime) AS lastSeen
  FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
  WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
  GROUP BY swarmId
  ORDER BY lastSeen DESC
  LIMIT 250
)
ORDER BY swarmId
list.label: Swarm
list.name: swarm
list.query:
SELECT swarmId
FROM (
  SELECT swarmId, max(eventTime) AS lastSeen
  FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
  WHERE $__timeFilter(eventTime)
  GROUP BY swarmId
  ORDER BY lastSeen DESC
  LIMIT 250
)
ORDER BY swarmId

list.definition:
SELECT callIdKey
FROM (
  SELECT callIdKey, count() AS txns
  FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
  PREWHERE swarmId = '${swarm}' AND $__timeFilter(eventTime)
  WHERE callIdKey != ''
  GROUP BY callIdKey
  ORDER BY txns DESC
  LIMIT 250
)
ORDER BY callIdKey
list.label: Call ID
list.name: callId
list.query:
SELECT callIdKey
FROM (
  SELECT callIdKey, count() AS txns
  FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
  PREWHERE swarmId = '${swarm}' AND $__timeFilter(eventTime)
  WHERE callIdKey != ''
  GROUP BY callIdKey
  ORDER BY txns DESC
  LIMIT 250
)
ORDER BY callIdKey

list.definition:
SELECT businessCodeLabel
FROM (
  SELECT if(businessCodeKey = '', 'n/a', businessCodeKey) AS businessCodeLabel, count() AS txns
  FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
  PREWHERE swarmId = '${swarm}' AND $__timeFilter(eventTime)
  GROUP BY businessCodeLabel
  ORDER BY txns DESC
  LIMIT 250
)
ORDER BY businessCodeLabel
list.label: Business Code
list.name: businessCode
list.query:
SELECT businessCodeLabel
FROM (
  SELECT if(businessCodeKey = '', 'n/a', businessCodeKey) AS businessCodeLabel, count() AS txns
  FROM ph_tx_outcome_v2
  PREWHERE swarmId = '${swarm}' AND $__timeFilter(eventTime)
  GROUP BY businessCodeLabel
  ORDER BY txns DESC
  LIMIT 250
)
ORDER BY businessCodeLabel
